description: This API is the second release of the API that returns integer multi-terminal dc line converter quantities. This API routine was first introduced in release 31.0.0. ierr, ival = dcncin_2(name, ibus, string)

parameters.name: string
parameters.description: String indicating the dc line quantity desired. (input).

string.description: Firing angle status: (-1) low; (0) regulating; (1) high.
Tap status: (-1) low; (0) regulating; (1) high; (-2) locked.

error_codes.description: Bus not a converter bus of dc line ‘NAME’; ‘IVAL’ unchanged.
